subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath sent forth the Messengers and revealed the Books for the guidance of His servants and His creation, and made known unto them His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ارسل الرسل و انزل الکتب لهدایه عباده و خلقه و عرفهم سبیله و
